world.title: All Iranian officials and commanders killed in the past nine months

world.title: Escalating Middle East Conflict: Global Implications and Strategic Strikes
world.description: The ongoing war in the Middle East intensifies with Iran targeting a UK-US base, while Iran's nuclear sites suffer repeat strikes. Global tensions rise as Israel and the US launch attacks, leading to significant casualties and regional instability. The conflict impacts global oil prices and disrupts communications in Iran.

world.description: James O'Donnell (pictured), 35, was driving 33mph over the speed limit when he knocked down 63-year-old Keith Hornby on a road in Huyton, Merseyside, on March 5 last year.

world.title: Forensic examination under way in Derry after woman dies

business.title: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson warns of significant hit from Middle East War
business.description: Air India CEO Campbell Wilson warned employees of significant financial repercussions from the Middle East conflict, with 2,500 flights cancelled and operations at 30% capacity. Fuel costs have more than doubled, and rerouted flights are increasing expenses, impacting the airline's books from next month. The airline is imposing fuel surcharges but faces risks to demand due to economic uncertainty.

business.title: Paschi Investor PLT Wants Lovaglio as CEO in Competing List

business.title: Dentist warns against rising use of unregulated fashion braces

business.title: CoinDCX founders Sumit Gupta, Neeraj Khandelwal arrested; company alleges impersonation conspiracy
business.description: CoinDCX said an FIR against its cofounders relies on false allegations linked to impersonation fraud. Fraudsters posed as founders, diverting funds to third-party accounts. The company reported over 1,212 fake websites between April 1, 2024 and January 5, 2026 and said that it is cooperating with authorities. CoinDCX also warned of rising cyber fraud in India’s digital finance ecosystem.

science.description: These planets are comparable in size to Saturn but have extremely low mass, making their density similar to cotton candy.

science.title: Cyanobacteria have the potential to turn Martian soil fertile

science.title: Kepler-51 Super-Puff Planets Baffle Scientists as JWST Finds No Atmosphere Clues
science.description: Astronomers are puzzled by Kepler-51’s ultra-light “super-puff” planets. Even NASA’s James Webb Space Telescope failed to detect their atmospheres, hinting at thick hydrocarbon haze and challenging planet formation theories.
